content:
🔥 RadioPlayerV3 | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Streaming music and radio content into Telegram group voice chats for continuous playback.
✨ Key Features: • Playlist with queuing and 24/7 radio support • YouTube Live stream support • Auto-fallback to radio when playlist ends • Persistent playback • Interactive controls
📖 Summary: RadioPlayerV3 is an advanced Telegram bot designed to stream music and radio directly into group voice chats. It supports playlists, YouTube live streams, and ensures persistent playback, making it ideal for continuous audio streaming in Telegram communities.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
